32.reason: Always true after printing first digit; prints a decimal point even when there is only one digit, producing extra dot. Should check if more digits follow.

34.reason: Prints a decimal point even when there are no more digits after the first, resulting in a trailing dot.

reasons.buggy-qwen3.6-plus-2: 0.3333333333333333 , reason:  [Unconditionally prints a decimal point even when there are no subsequent significant digits, violating the output format requirement that integers should not have a decimal point.]
